In spite of these points planets of trine and quadrant are to be

I have noticed in few rasi charts that location of moon along with
Satum in sixth house from Ascendant will insist the native to reside
abroad. Location of moontSaturn or Sat/Mars or Rahu Mars in ninth will
give trouble to the native while in journey even during staying foceign.
